attributes.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

attributes.subject: Payment Options to Suit Your Budget
attributes.html:
Hello {{contact.name}},

We understand that cost can be a concern when considering our services. Many of our members choose from a variety of payment plans designed to make the monthly cost manageable and fit within their budget.

If you'd like, I can send you details on these options to help you make the best decision for your needs.

Feel free to reach out with any questions or if you'd like to discuss further.

Best regards,
{{user.name}}

attributes.body: Send SMS using [LOC-BOOKING] rebook link/message to encourage Richmond contacts to rebook. Use exact user message content for SMS.

Hi {{contact.name}},

Just a quick note to let you know the door's open whenever timing and budget line up. Whenever you're ready, reach out and we'll help you get started again!

Best regards,
{{user.name}}

attributes.body:
{{contact.first_name}}, 

totally normal to want to think it over.

 Most members tell us the first visit was the hardest part everything after is straightforward and on your schedule. 

Happy to answer anything by text. 

Reply STOP to opt out.

attributes.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

templates.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

attributes.subject: What membership actually looks like, week to week
attributes.html:
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, A lot of guys go in expecting complicated it's really not.

Most members describe it as: a quick visit on the schedule, a few minutes at the front desk, and a conversation with your Patient Care Consultant about how things are going. That's it. There's no big commitment moment after the first visit it's just part of the routine, like anything else you've built a habit around.

Any specific question on your mind?
Reply here a real person answers.

attributes.body: {{contact.first_name}}, makes sense to talk it over at home first. If it would help, your partner is welcome to join a quick call or your next visit most spouses have the same three questions. Reply STOP to opt out.

attributes.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

templates.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

attributes.subject: Payment Options to Suit Your Budget
attributes.html:
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, Totally reasonable to want your partner looped in before deciding anything. We're glad to have them join either a quick call, or your next visit in person.

The questions partners usually ask: what the time commitment looks like, how the cost breaks down, and what actually changes day to day. All fair, all easy to answer together.

Just reply here with a time that works for both of you, or have them call us directly at (757) 806-6263.

attributes.body: {{contact.first_name}}, take the time you need. One thing worth knowing: your consult results stay on file, so picking this up later is a 10-minute conversation, not a restart. Reply STOP to opt out.

attributes.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

templates.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

attributes.subject: A few questions members ask before deciding
attributes.html:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

No rush at all. While you're thinking it over, here are answers to the

things members usually want to know before committing:

- Your consult notes stay on file nothing gets lost if you wait

- There's no expiration on picking this back up

- Most members say the decision got easier once they slept on it, not harder

If something specific is on your mind, just reply we'd rather answer the real question than guess at it.

attributes.body: {{contact.first_name}}, understood — life's schedule wins sometimes. When things open up, rebooking takes about a minute and your consult carries over. Reply STOP to opt out.

attributes.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

templates.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

attributes.subject: We work around your schedule, not the other way around
attributes.html: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, If timing was the issue, good news visits are quick (about an hour), and we keep extended hours on Mondays and Fridays specifically for schedules like yours. Whenever your calendar clears, rebooking takes under a minute and nothing about your consult needs to be redone.
